metadata.description: z0rd0n88's Claude Code mods — plugins, skills, and tooling.

plugins.name: idea-autopsy
plugins.description: Three-skill idea-review loop: stress-test holes, iterate to v2, then deliver an invest/skip verdict.

plugins.name: inventory
plugins.description: Generate .CLAUDE.inventory.md — a per-project audit of every Claude Code automation, tagged installed vs custom.

plugins.name: total-review
plugins.description: Parallel multi-agent code review pattern. Fans specialised reviewers along clean layer boundaries with exclusion-list dedup against the issue tracker.

plugins.name: multi-agent-review
plugins.description: Parallel multi-agent review with synthesizer dedup + cross-axis severity budget. Targets PR/dir/file/spec/diff/slices. Ships a review→fix→re-review loop wrapper too.

plugins.name: i-cant-even
plugins.description: Design-decision advisor. Orients on the codebase, grills you, runs a 4-persona panel, delivers a one-screen recommendation memo.

plugins.name: multi-agent-developer
plugins.description: Manager-led TDD dev team (≤4 Opus agents) that debates a spec across RED→GREEN→REFACTOR rounds, synthesizes via an architect, materializes a worktree, runs tests. Plus a one-time setup skill.

plugins.name: code-rinse-repeat
plugins.description: End-to-end spec→APPROVE orchestrator. Composes multi-agent-developer (build) with multi-agent-review (review-fix loop). Lather, rinse, repeat — for code.

plugins.name: baton
plugins.description: Long-running multi-phase build orchestrator: baton-runner queues specs as implement→review→fix units, baton-runner-multi-agent uses multi-agent dev teams per phase, baton-pass writes session handoff notes.

plugins.name: scratchpad
plugins.description: User-invoked /scratchpad capture: append items (or check them off) on a configured GitHub checkbox issue. Smart section placement, dup-detection, never closes the issue.

plugins.name: idea-panel
plugins.description: Parallel panel of thinking-skills mental-model lenses generates candidate ideas for a topic, then a synthesizer ranks and dedupes them into one shortlist. Generative sibling of multi-agent-review.

plugins.name: edit-agents
plugins.description: Toggle Claude Code agents on/off by moving .md files between agents/ and a sibling agents-parked/ dir (agents/disabled/ does not hide agents because agents/ is scanned recursively).

plugins.name: daily-loop
plugins.description: Auto-triggered workflow routing table — session-type → skill-chain, plus brainstorm routing. Not user-invocable.

plugins.name: idea-nebula
plugins.description: Evidence-based brainstorming pipeline: four independent entropy-source generators (VS tails, ordinary personas, far-domain defixation, live demand mining) with mandatory boldness revision, blind pairwise-swap ranking, live demand grounding, and a barbell (safe + moonshot) shortlist.

plugins.name: spec-tacular
plugins.description: User-invoked only. Builds a code-grounded, implementation-ready engineering spec through three gated phases: reconnaissance & alignment, a mid-draft outline-approval gate, then a fully-detailed spec with embedded decision records, alternative analysis, and fact-checking. Hand-off ready — no clarifying questions left.
